content.question: What is the overall deductible?
content.answer: Calendar year aggregate deductible. $1,750 Individual / $3,500 Family.
content.explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay. If you have other family members on the policy, the overall family deductible must be met before the plan begins to pay.

topic: Are there services covered before you meet your deductible?

content.question: Are there services covered before you meet your deductible?
content.answer: Yes. Does not apply to Preventive care and services listed below as "No charge"
content.explanation: This plan covers some items and services even if you haven’t yet met the deductible amount. But a copayment or coinsurance may apply. For example, this plan covers certain preventive services without cost-sharing and before you meet your deductible. See a list of covered preventive services at https://www.healthcare.gov/coverage/preventive-care-benefits/ .

topic: Are there other deductibles for specific?

content.question: Are there other deductibles for specific?
content.explanation: You don’t have to meet deductibles for specific services.

topic: What is the out - of - pocket limit for this plan?

content.question: What is the out - of - pocket limit for this plan?
content.answer: In - network: $3,500 Individual / $7,000 Family, Out-of-network: Not Applicable
content.explanation: The out - of- f- pocket limit is the most you could pay in a year for covered services. If you have other family members in this plan, the overall family out-of-pocket limit must be met.

topic: What is not included in the out - of - pocket limit?

content.question: What is not included in the out - of - pocket limit?
content.answer: Premium , balance - billed charges, and health care this plan doesn't cover.
content.explanation: Even though you pay these expenses, they don’t count toward the out-of-pocket limit .

topic: Will you pay less if you use a network provider?

content.question: Will you pay less if you use a network provider?
content.answer: Yes. See www.premera.com or call 1-844 - 985 - 4160 for a list of network providers .
content.explanation: This plan uses a provider network. You will pay less if you use a provider in the plan’s network . You will pay the most if you use an out-of-network provider, and you might receive a bill from a provider for the difference between the provider’s charge and what your plan pays (balance billing). Be aware your network provider might use an out-of-network provider for some services (such as lab work). Check with your provider before you get services.

topic: Do you need a referral to see a specialist?

content.question: Do you need a referral to see a specialist?
content.explanation: You can see the specialist you choose without a referral .
